meta.project_description: Build a todo app with auth

repositories_selected.name: ixartz/SaaS-Boilerplate
repositories_selected.description: 🚀🎉📚 SaaS Boilerplate built with Next.js + Tailwind CSS + Shadcn UI + TypeScript. ⚡️ Full-stack React application with Auth, Multi-tenancy, Roles & Permissions, i18n, Landing Page, DB, Logging, Testing

repositories_selected.name: googleapis/google-api-nodejs-client
repositories_selected.description: Google's officially supported Node.js client library for accessing Google APIs. Support for authorization and authentication with OAuth 2.0, API Keys and JWT (Service Tokens) is included.
